description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:latest Docker image and caches the local Maven repository at .m2/repository/. Define two stages, build and deploy. In the build stage add an install job that runs mvn clean install -P dist -Dsettings.security=.m2/settings-security.xml --settings .m2/settings.xml -Dmaven.repo.local=.m2/repository/ --batch-mode. In the deploy stage add a deploy-ossrh job that runs mvn clean javadoc:jar source:jar deploy -DskipTests -P dist -Dsettings.security=.m2/settings-security.xml --settings .m2/settings.xml -Dmaven.repo.local=.m2/repository/ --batch-mode and a deploy-webapp job that cd's into classiga-api, runs mvn clean package tomcat7:redeploy -P prod -Dsettings.security=../.m2/settings-security.xml --settings ../.m2/settings.xml -Dmaven.repo.local=../.m2/repository/ --batch-mode, then cd ../classiga-web and runs the same Maven command, both jobs limited to the master branch.
